expectations.text: Dockerfile installs .NET SDK 8 (dotnet-sdk-8.0 or equivalent) alongside Node.js
expectations.evidence: Dockerfile.dev uses mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:8.0-bookworm-slim as base and installs Node 20 from NodeSource

expectations.text: Dockerfile does NOT bake in COPY package*.json + npm install
expectations.evidence: No COPY package.json or npm install baked into Dockerfile.dev

expectations.text: Plan runs create-nx-workspace INSIDE a docker container, not on the host
expectations.evidence: PLAN.md step 2 uses `npx nx@latest init --nxCloud=skip` inside the container, NOT `create-nx-workspace`. The assertion specifies create-nx-workspace; this substitutes with nx init.
create-nx-workspace was not used at all; `nx init` replaces it. No preset argument is passed.
PLAN.md step 4 uses `nx add @nx-dotnet/core` — the community plugin, NOT the official first-party @nx/dotnet plugin

expectations.text: Plan creates a sample .NET webapi via `dotnet new webapi` inside the container
expectations.evidence: PLAN.md uses `nx g @nx-dotnet/core:app api --template=webapi` — the community plugin's generator, not `dotnet new webapi`

expectations.text: Plan runs `nx configure-ai-agents` (or equivalent) to wire up Claude/Nx MCP
expectations.evidence: PLAN.md step 6 manually creates a CLAUDE.md and a .mcp.json instead of running `nx configure-ai-agents`. Misses Nx's first-party flow.

expectations.text: Angular serve command in compose includes --host 0.0.0.0
expectations.evidence: PLAN.md step 5 and docker-compose.yml do not show a serve service command directly, but the exec example uses `nx serve web --host 0.0.0.0`. Partial credit — command text present in the plan.

expectations.text: CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true is set in serve compose file
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml environment block does not include CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING. File-watching will fail silently on macOS/WSL bind mounts.

expectations.text: Port 4200 is published from serve container to the host
Assistant does NOT recommend installing Node or .NET SDK on the host
expectations.evidence: PLAN.md explicitly says 'No Node and no .NET SDK on the host'. Claude Code install on host is acceptable since that's a separate tool.
